met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
DEPSN_MEDICARE Depression - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
DEPSN_COMBINED_EVER Depression - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
DEPSN_MEDICAID_EVER Depression - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
DEPSN_MEDICARE_EVER Depression - Medicare Only Claims, First
